name: Rafael Holdings, Inc.
summary: . OVERVIEW Rafael Holdings, Inc. (Rafael Holdings, Rafael, we or the Company) is a biotechnology company that develops pharmaceuticals and holds interests in clinical and early-stage companies that develop pharmaceuticals and medical devices. Our lead candidate is Trappsol Cyclo, which is being evaluated in clinical trials for the potential treatment of Niemann-Pick Disease Type C1 (NPC1), a rare, fatal and progressive genetic disorder. We also hold: (i) a majority equity interest in LipoMedix P...
